summary: Completed PG-002 Phase 3-1 — Migration runner with dual SQLite+Pg CI support. All 6 requirements met.

requirements.name: bun install
requirements.detail: bun install completed successfully; all Postgres driver deps (pg, @types/pg, @electric-sql/pglite) materialized

requirements.name: drizzle-kit generate
requirements.detail: Generated new migration 20260530202327_chemical_moira_mactaggert adding runtime_events table with 8 indexes

requirements.name: migration loading in db.pg.ts
requirements.detail: applyMigrations function already exists in db.pg.ts, handles both PGlite (local exec) and node-postgres (drizzle migrator) paths

requirements.name: wire migration in db.ts
requirements.detail: Added applyMigrations import and auto-migration call on Client init (fire-and-forget for PGlite speed)

requirements.name: Postgres CI service
requirements.detail: Added pg-test job to test.yml with Postgres 16 service container, OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL env var, and bun run test:pg

requirements.name: typecheck verification
requirements.detail: No new type errors from this change; all errors are pre-existing (agent-queries.ts, lifecycle/, explanation.ts, etc.)

files_modified.change: import applyMigrations from #db; call applyMigrations on Client init
test:pg script now runs all .pg.test.ts files
added pg-test job with Postgres 16 service container

migration_tests.output: Both applyMigrations tests pass: creates expected tables, applies all migrations without error

pre_existing_errors: test/storage/adapter.pg.test.ts (1 - pre-existing PgAdapter positional arg bug)

new_migration.columns: id, session_id, run_id, parent_event_id, correlation_id, ts, actor, event_type, phase, status, tool_name, file_path, model, duration_ms, token_input, token_output, error_code, error_message, recoverable, payload_json, campaign_id, lane_id, role, time_created, time_updated
new_migration.indexes: 8 indexes on session_id, event_type, ts, actor, run_id, (session_id, ts), campaign_id, lane_id

boundary_claim.consumer_purpose: Apply pending PG schema migrations on application startup and validate PG integration in CI

proof_obligations.migrations_generated_from_all_pg_schemas: drizzle-kit generate produced migration with runtime_events table (36 lines SQL, 58KB snapshot)
proof_obligations.migrations_applied_on_startup: applyMigrations called from db.ts Client init with error logging
proof_obligations.pglite_path_works_locally: migration.pg.test.ts 2/2 pass with :memory: PGlite, adapter.pg.test.ts proven independently
proof_obligations.postgres_service_in_ci: pg-test job in test.yml uses postgres:16 with health check and OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL
proof_obligations.test_script_runs_all_pg_tests: test:pg script globs *.pg.test.ts instead of single file
proof_obligations.no_new_type_errors: typecheck output shows only pre-existing errors, none from our changes
